facts.text: gm installer detail (bin/install.js, gm-method): canonical installer, no npx skills library. Copies skills/gm into <home>/.claude/skills/gm/ (personal) or ./.claude/skills/gm/ (--project); dir name IS the /command. Non-interactive (-y/--yes or non-TTY) SETS two Claude Code settings (effortLevel:'low', alwaysThinkingEnabled:false) and explains the reasoning-in-code framing; interactive OFFERS them. The reasoning-in-code framing: LLM reasons by running hypotheses as code/browser probes and reading real results, replacing hidden thinking tokens with witnessed execution. autoCompactEnabled and autoCompactWindow are NOT set by the installer (removed). test.js checkRenameAndInstaller asserts no skills/gm-skill, package id stays gm-skill, installer lands the skill + writes exactly effortLevel+alwaysThinkingEnabled into temp HOME, asserts autoCompactWindow===undefined and autoCompactEnabled===undefined.
